disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak from cruise ship officially ends - The Star
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak from cruise ship officially ends The Star
